mdRecord.dcterms:title: Barter Children's Theater: Exciting Productions for the Younger Set
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Poster for the Barter Children's Theater. Shows include: Wizard of Oz, July 20-25 | Robin Hood, July 27- Aug 3 | Hansel and Gretel, Aug 4-6 | Brer Rabbit, Aug 7-8 | Robin Hood, Aug 10-12 | Wizard of Oz, Aug 13-15.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Theater
Virginia
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
